faqs.q: Which structural design codes do you follow?
faqs.a: We strictly adhere to IBC, ASCE 7, ACI 318, AISC, and local building codes, ensuring safety and compliance.

faqs.q: What Level of Development (LOD) do you provide?
faqs.a: We provide BIM modeling from LOD 100 (conceptual) up to LOD 500 (as-built and facility management).

faqs.a: Our primary tools include Autodesk Revit, Navisworks, AutoCAD Civil 3D, ReCap, and BIM 360 for cloud collaboration.
